ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "source_user" TEXT /* Username of the user who triggered the event */,
  "source_user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user who triggered the event */,
  "source_department" TEXT /* Department of the user who triggered the event */,
  "target_user" TEXT /* Username of the user affected by the event */,
  "target_user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user affected by the event */,
  "target_department" TEXT /* Department of the user affected by the event */,
  "target_group" TEXT /* Group affected by the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "windows_event_type" TEXT /* Type of Windows event (e.g., Success Audit) */,
  "target_account_type" TEXT /* Type of target account (e.g., Domain) */,
  "ref_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the event */,
  "event_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event source */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_source_department FOREIGN KEY ("source_department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_target_user FOREIGN KEY ("target_user") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_source_id") REFERENCES event_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_target_department FOREIGN KEY ("target_department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_source_user FOREIGN KEY ("source_user") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_target_group FOREIGN KEY ("target_group") REFERENCES groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_severity" TEXT /* Severity level associated with the event type */,
  "type_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event type */,
  "type_action_required" TEXT /* Action required when this event type occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_admin" TEXT /* Name of the group administrator */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log */,
  "log_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_log_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_source_id") REFERENCES event_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_creator" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance requirement */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Name of the compliance requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the compliance requirement */,
  "compliance_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the compliance requirement */,
  "compliance_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the compliance requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance */,
  "report_creator" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the compliance report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the compliance report */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the compliance report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_compliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_id") REFERENCES compliance ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
